category_title: Students with emotional disturbance and autism exhibiting significant behavioral challenges
scenario_title: Social errors escalating to major misbehaviors during cooperative learning
minimal_context: The student is working in a cooperative learning group with peers to complete a shared assignment.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please work with your group to finish the science poster.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I'm not doing it. He keeps staring at me and trying to mess up my part.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just focus on your own section and keep working.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Stands up from the group table) You're doing it on purpose! Stop looking at me!

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to sit back down and finish the group assignment.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I'm going to break your face! (Sweeps the poster and markers off the table onto the floor)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please work with your group to finish the science poster.

STUDENT: I'm not doing it. He keeps staring at me and trying to mess up my part.

TUTOR: Just focus on your own section and keep working.

STUDENT: (Stands up from the group table) You're doing it on purpose! Stop looking at me!

TUTOR: You need to sit back down and finish the group assignment.

STUDENT: I'm going to break your face! (Sweeps the poster and markers off the table onto the floor)

task.content: Interpreting social cues and participating in teamwork
task.learning_goal: Conform to school-wide expectations and develop healthy social relationships

context.social_setting: Interacting with peers during embedded instruction

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When students make social errors or face a provocation
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Verbal threats, destruction of property, physical aggression

behavior_patterns.condition: When experiencing difficulty interpreting social cues
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Behaviors that interfere with the learning of others
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Significant internalizing and externalizing behavior problems
